Step 29: N at 25-28 (gray/dark), 31-34 (green), 43-46 (green) - G frame moved
Step 30: N at 31-34 (green), 43-46 (green) - N at 25-28 gone
So after clicking the hollow square at 37-40, the N at 25-28 disappeared but the N at 31-34 remained. This is different from what I expected. Let me check the actual state.

sections.label: TOOL CALL: python
sections.content:
<tool_call>
<function=python>
<parameter=code>
# Check what changed after clicking hollow square at col 38
seg = current_frame.segmentation
N_nodes = [n for n in seg['nodes'] if n['color'] == 'N']
G_nodes = [n for n in seg['nodes'] if n['color'] == 'G']
g_nodes = [n for n in seg['nodes'] if n['color'] == 'g']

print("Current N nodes:")
for n in N_nodes:
    cols = [p[1] for p in n['boundary']]
    rows = [p[0] for p in n['boundary']]
    print(f"  cols {min(cols)}-{max(cols)}, rows {min(rows)}-{max(rows)}")

print(f"\nG nodes: {len(G_nodes)}")
for n in G_nodes:
    cols = [p[1] for p in n['boundary']]
    print(f"  cols {min(cols)}-{max(cols)}")

print(f"\nHollow sq nodes: {len(g_nodes)}")
for n in g_nodes:
    cols = [p[1] for p in n['boundary']]
    print(f"  cols {min(cols)}-{max(cols)}")

# Compare with last transition
if last_transition:
    before_seg = last_transition.before_frame.segmentation
    before_N = [n for n in before_seg['nodes'] if n['color'] == 'N']
    before_N_cols = [(min(p[1] for p in n['boundary']), max(p[1] for p in n['boundary'])) for n in before_N]
    print(f"\nBefore: N cols = {before_N_cols}")
    after_N_cols = [(min(p[1] for p in n['boundary']), max(p[1] for p in n['boundary'])) for n in N_nodes]
    print(f"After: N cols = {after_N_cols}")
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>
